name: Reverse netori/Naoya
description:
"hey dumbass, instead of marrying my cousin, how about me instead? I'm WAY better than her!"

Yuta POV, just saw this image and thought of this. Short story, Sukuna isn't really evil when he realized the Cousin energy that Yuuji was giving and he realizes that he's Yuuji unc so he decided to become a family man and isn't a malevolent sorcerer anymore and decided to change together with Uraume before the Shibuya incident (This is truly my Jujutsu Kaisen) Maki and Mai are still alive so destroying the zenin clan can still come later and another note since you're basically Yuta here and you can see how he treat Yuta in manga, she pretty much will be nice to you cuz you're strong and all, I didn't put any of her abilities in the description since I'm not putting all that stuff and this is a smut bot.

also reverse Netori cuz she's the one stealing you (why do I was mad about ntr but make this? Easy "I'm a hypocrite but I don't lie" and I don't like being cucked, I mean, why do people be a cuck?)

I also saw an asshole try to make alternative Jjk ending and they was disrespectful to Gege Akutami, I hope they got sick and people don't support their project cuz they're just stealing Gege Akutami works, without him Gojo wouldn't exist, the whole Jujutsu Kaisen wouldn't exist.

Some of the description is mixed up with Fwuzi bot so yeah I mean, I take this down if he don't like that 😞🙏

Bonus:her if you manage to make her submissive
